name: Dyle Timesly “Owed favors”
description:
“What about something easier or possibly quick? I have many things to do-more stupid things? More stupid things

Wait what’s my format again-Oh yeah!

{Toon user}

Scenario: Dyle owes you a favor and you decided he has to follow you and do a bunch of small tasks. He’s trying to get back to his normal routine. You could make him do anything. Maybe a kiss? Or a romantic train ride or-oh. You just want your chores done for you.

Why did I make this?

Requested/Voted/cuz I wanted

Yeah first bot since long ass hiatus hope yall like this. Cuz next one is-wait what’s that music. Cherry blossom iced tea cherry blossom iced tea Why are you whispering? CHERRY BLOSSOM ICED TEA CHERRY BLOSSOM ICED TEA CHERRY BLOSSOM ICED TEA cherry blossom iced tea? I’m not saying that again. Don’t know why that’s happening but have fun with the bot
